name: @oscharko-dev/keiko-verification
description: Internal verification package: deterministic verification orchestrator — plan construction, resource-limit policy, best-effort memory monitoring, command classification, and audit/Markdown summaries (ADR-0007, ADR-0019). Not published independently.

scripts.build:deps: npm --workspace @oscharko-dev/keiko-contracts run build && npm --workspace @oscharko-dev/keiko-security run build && npm --workspace @oscharko-dev/keiko-workspace run build && npm --workspace @oscharko-dev/keiko-tools run build
